caption:

want pros who do it right? compare local quotes at renuehome.com.
alt: Tip, make sure your contractor pulls permits on a big remodel.

caption:
save this one 📌 four things to check before you hand anyone a deposit.

✔ license + insurance
✔ the quote in writing
✔ a couple references
✔ a real start and finish timeline

the pros in the renue home network are independent local companies, so you still vet them. this just helps. renuehome.com
alt: Before you hire a contractor checklist.

caption:
trust your gut, but also trust this list 🚩 walk away if you see

✔ cash only with a big deposit
✔ no written quote
✔ pressure to sign today
✔ no license number

compare vetted local pros the calm way at renuehome.com.
alt: Contractor red flags checklist.

caption:
small chore, big payoff. clogged gutters send water where you don't want it, straight toward your foundation. knock it out before the next big storm. 🌧️

alt: Tip, clean your gutters before the first big storm.

caption:
a real quote is more than a number. before you compare, make sure each one spells out 👇

✔ the full scope of work
✔ materials and labor
✔ a start date
✔ payment terms

compare apples to apples at renuehome.com.
alt: What a real quote includes checklist.

caption:
rule of thumb worth saving. a reasonable deposit is normal. paying for the whole job before it starts is not. 🚩

compare quotes from local pros at renuehome.com and pay as the work gets done.
alt: Tip, never pay 100 percent up front.
